name: [GRV-API] Disk Space Critical Alert
message:
Critical disk space alert for grv-api service.

Host: {{host.name}}
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}
Available Space: {{value}} bytes

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED:
1. Clean up old logs and temporary files
2. Archive old data
3. Expand disk capacity
4. Review data retention policies

Investigate: https://app.datadoghq.com/infrastructure?search=service%3Agrv-api

options.escalation_message: CRITICAL: Disk space exhausted. Service may fail soon!
